mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS productId, o.id AS productOptionId, p.name AS name, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, c.name AS categoryName, p.price AS price, o.stock AS stock, o.expire_date AS expireDate FROM products p INNER JOIN product_options o ON p.id = o.product_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, picture_saved_location FROM ( SELECT product_id, picture_saved_location, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC ) AS row_num FROM product_pictures ) WHERE row_num = 1 ) pp ON pp.product_id = p.id
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY o.expire_date ASC
ORDER BY o.stock ASC, o.expire_date ASC
ORDER BY p.id DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.name FROM categories c INNER JOIN products p ON c.id = p.category_id
